summary: Tested UI restructuring features: Users page Add User dropdown, Invitations tab, Permissions page Audit Logs tab, sidebar verification, and seat reservation timeout changes. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI restructuring features verified working. Users page: Add User dropdown with 'Standard Add' (opens modal) and 'Invite User' (switches to invitations view), 'Invitations' tab embedded. Permissions page: 5 tabs visible for super_admin (Roles, User Permissions, Matrix, Audit Trail, Audit Logs). Sidebar: Invitations removed from Admin Config submenu. Seat timeout: Backend RESERVATION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES=3, frontend text says '3 minutes', fallback timeouts use 3*60*1000. Seat swap: LiveSeatMap correctly releases oldest seat via /seat-bookings/release when maxSeats reached.

users_page_add_user_dropdown.details: Clicking 'Add User' button shows popover with 'Standard Add' and 'Invite User' options

users_page_standard_add.details: Clicking 'Standard Add' opens 'Create New User' modal

users_page_invite_user.details: Clicking 'Invite User' switches view to Invitations tab content

users_page_invitations_tab.details: 'Invitations' tab visible as 3rd tab after 'Users' and 'Permissions', shows InvitationsManagement component with send/list/revoke

permissions_page_audit_logs_tab.details: For super_admin, 5 tabs visible: Roles, User Permissions, Matrix, Audit Trail, Audit Logs. Audit Logs tab shows embedded AuditLogs component

sidebar_invitations_removed.details: 'Invitations' does NOT appear as standalone item in Admin Config sidebar (moved to Users page)

seat_reservation_timeout_backend.details: RESERVATION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES = 3 in seat_bookings.py, response includes timeout_minutes: 3

seat_reservation_timeout_frontend.details: TravelBooking.jsx shows '3 minutes' text, LiveSeatMap.jsx uses 3*60*1000 for fallback timeouts

seat_selection_swap.details: LiveSeatMap correctly handles seat swap: releases oldest seat via API call to /seat-bookings/release, reserves new seat, shows toast 'Seat swapped: X → Y'
